title: Build files cleaner (Swabra)
description: Removes checkout directory files generated during the build.

options.description: Allows the build feature to detect and report or kill processes that keep the agent checkout directory locked after the build finishes. Supports only Windows agents with [handle.exe](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/handle) installed.

The newline-delimited set of [+|-:path rules](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/build-files-cleaner-swabra.html) that specify which folders Swabra should monitor. Supports absolute and relative to the build checkout directory paths. If not specified, Swabra monitors the entire checkout directory.
